relayChannels.label: Output A
relayChannels.gate: Shield routing plus relay trigger voltage, current, polarity, and isolation must be verified before wiring.

relayChannels.label: Output B
relayChannels.gate: Shield routing plus relay trigger voltage, current, polarity, and isolation must be verified before wiring.

relayChannels.label: Output C
relayChannels.gate: Shield routing plus relay trigger voltage, current, polarity, and isolation must be verified before wiring.

relayChannels.label: Output D
relayChannels.gate: Shield routing plus relay trigger voltage, current, polarity, and isolation must be verified before wiring.

constructionSequence.title: Visual blueprint review
constructionSequence.summary: Start with the conceptual system map, R&D loop, and safety proof ladder before any low-voltage bench action.

constructionSequence.title: Board and shield inspection
constructionSequence.summary: Record the active single power source, jumper state, rail checks, and shield continuity before any external module is connected.

constructionSequence.title: MicroSD asset and log review
constructionSequence.summary: Keep static assets and log paths source-backed while treating storage behavior as a verification gate.

constructionSequence.title: XBee read-only discovery
constructionSequence.summary: Use the USB adapter as a PC dock for passive discovery first, then explicitly confirmed AT read queries only.

constructionSequence.title: Expansion dry proof
constructionSequence.summary: Use CD74HC4067 for ADC test inputs only and prove MCP23017/TCA9555 latch behavior on LEDs or a logic analyzer before relay inputs.

constructionSequence.title: Qualified load review
constructionSequence.summary: Treat load or mains work as a review package, not a public wiring procedure.

safetyGates.title: Mains work blocked
safetyGates.summary: No step-by-step mains wiring instructions are published, and the public materials are not a qualified electrical review.

safetyGates.title: Relay contacts blocked
safetyGates.summary: Relay load wiring waits for trigger polarity, input current, voltage compatibility, and isolation verification.

safetyGates.title: XBee writes blocked
safetyGates.summary: The radio path starts with passive discovery and fixed AT read queries; setting writes require later owner review and explicit approval.

safetyGates.title: MicroSD behavior gated
safetyGates.summary: Assets and logs are planned for the static HMI path, but card behavior and bus details remain evidence-gated.

safetyGates.title: R&D loop controls scope
safetyGates.summary: Role-lane review keeps framework, firmware, hardware, communications, QA, and release work separated by gates.

safetyGates.title: Mux relay outputs rejected
safetyGates.summary: The CD74HC4067 path is limited to slow inputs; relay pin relief moves to a latched expander plus verified driver stage.

futureTracks: Confirm repository Pages source is set to GitHub Actions before public deployment.
Review the build-script allowlist before adding any file to the public artifact.
Close hardware blockers before firmware flashing, relay switching, XBee setting writes, or mains/load wiring.
Verify the exact TFT, mux breakout, expander board, driver stage, and MicroSD module behavior before wiring.
Keep future generated screenshots, raw uploads, vendor PDFs, and bulky binaries out of the public Pages artifact.
Permit only the named generated technical backplates under site/github-pages/assets/.
